description: Input schema for the execute_select tool (validated read-only SELECT)

sql.description: SELECT SQL query to execute (must be read-only; non-SELECT statements are rejected)

limit.description: Optional preview limit. Defaults to 20 and is capped at 200. If provided by the agent and within the allowed range, it is respected.

connectionId.description: Optional connection profile ID (e.g., ECUADOR or PANAMA). Normalized to uppercase without diacritics. If omitted, the default profile is used.
